title: EnderChestHeadsUP
description: A simple HUD for viewing your ender chest contents.
body:
# ECHU

The EnderChest HeadsUp Mod is a client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft that provides a convenient, customizable heads-up display (HUD) of your Ender Chest inventory.
## Features:

- **Real-time Ender Chest Display**: See the contents of your Ender Chest inventory directly on your screen.
  
- **Configurable Position**: Choose from 9 different anchor points (top-left, center-right, bottom-middle, etc.) to place the HUD anywhere you like.
  
- **X and Y Offset Sliders**: Fine-tune the position of the HUD with precise X and Y offset controls. You can also drag the preview directly on the config screen to adjust its position.
  
- **Transparency Toggle**: Make the HUD transparent or opaque to suit your preference and minimize visual clutter.
  
- **Vertical/Horizontal Layout**: Switch between a horizontal (default) or vertical display of your Ender Chest slots.
  
- **Mini Mode**: Reduce the size of the HUD to a more compact view.
  
- **Show Only on Hover**: Configure the HUD to only appear when your mouse hovers over its area, providing a cleaner interface when not actively checking your Ender Chest.
  
- **Persistent Data**: Your Ender Chest inventory data is automatically saved and loaded per server or single-player world, ensuring your HUD always displays the correct items.
  
- **Manual Save Keybind**: A dedicated keybind (L by default) allows you to manually force a save of your Ender Chest data.
  
- **Config Screen**: Easily access and modify all settings through an in-game configuration screen, accessible via a keybind (K by default).
  
- **Old Data Cleanup**: Automatically cleans up old, unused Ender Chest data to prevent excessive file storage.

## Known Bugs
- In the preview when vertical mode is enabled, the draggable field remains the same as when it wasn't enabled.
